title: jasione perennis subsp. humilis
intro: Jasione perennis subsp. humilis, also known as the Alpine button or small blue thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasione perennis subsp. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to salves and creams for topical use.
